revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{Namespace detect| |main={{if preview|{{Error|Do not use {{tl|Draft article}} in mainspace}}|}} |other={{#ifeq:{{{catonly|}}}|yes||{{mbox | name = Draft article | image = [[File:Under_construction_icon-blue.svg|40px|alt=|link=]] | text =
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Draft article check|{{{1}}}}}|{{Draft article check}}}}
'''This is a [[WP:Drafts|draft article]]'''. It is a work in progress [[Wikipedia:Be bold|open to editing]] by [[Wikipedia:Who writes Wikipedia?|anyone]]. Please ensure [[Wikipedia:Core content policies|core content policies]] are met before publishing it as a [[Wikipedia:What is an article?|live Wikipedia article]]{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{sp}}at [[{{{1}}}]]}}.{{sp}}{{{text|}}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
---- {{find sources}}
{{automated tools}}{{·}}{{Wikipedia logs|note={{{lognotes|}}}}}. ----
}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||{{clear}}
}}{{last edited by|brief=yes}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}} {{Namespace detect showall|1={{#ifeq:{{{noafc|}}}|yes||{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||{{#invoke:AfC submission catcheck|submitted|This draft has been submitted and is currently awaiting review.|{{#if:{{REVISIONID}}0|Finished drafting? {{Clickable button|Submit for review|url={{fullurl:Wikipedia:Articles_for_creation/Submitting|withJS=MediaWiki:AFC-submit-wizard.js&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive}}{{#ifeq:{{{nomove|}}}|yes||{{if autoconfirmed| or {{Clickable button|Publish now|url={{fullurl:Special:MovePage|wpOldTitle={{urlencode:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}&wpNewTitle={{urlencode:{{PAGENAME}}}}&wpMovetalk=1&wpReason=Publishing%20draft%20article}}|class=mw-ui-progressive}}}}}}|Save your work by pressing the "{{int:Publishpage}}" button below, and a button will appear here allowing you to submit your draft for review.}}}}}}}}|draft=1|other={{#ifeq:{{{demo|yes}}}|yes|1}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}}}}{{#if:{{{join-in|}}}|{{mbox|text='''Join in and [[Wikipedia:Be bold|help expand this draft]]!'''}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{demo|}}}|yes||[[Category:{{#switch:{{lc:{{{subject|}}}}} |agriculture|food|drink|agriculture, food, and drink=Drafts about agriculture, food, and drink |art|architecture|art and architecture=Drafts about art and architecture |engineering|technology|engineering and technology=Drafts about engineering and technology |film|films=Draft articles on films |geography|places|geography and places=Draft articles on geographical topics |history=Drafts about history |language|literature|language and literature=Drafts about language and literature |math|mathematics=Drafts about mathematics |media|drama|media and drama=Draft articles on media |music=Drafts about music |natural sciences=Drafts about natural sciences |philosophy|religion|philosophy and religion=Drafts about philosophy and religion |social sciences|society|social sciences and society=Drafts about social sciences and society |sports|recreation|sports and recreation=Drafts about sports and recreation |television|tv=Draft articles on television |video games=Draft articles on video games |warfare=Drafts about warfare |#default=Draft articles}}|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}{{NOINDEX}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Namespace detect| |main={{if preview|{{Error|Do not use {{tl|Draft article}} in mainspace}}|}} |other={{#ifeq:{{{catonly|}}}|yes||{{mbox | name = Draft article | image = [[File:Under_construction_icon-blue.svg|40px|alt=|link=]] | text =
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Draft article check|{{{1}}}}}|{{Draft article check}}}}
'''This is a [[WP:Drafts|draft article]]'''. It is a work in progress [[Wikipedia:Be bold|open to editing]] by [[Wikipedia:Who writes Wikipedia?|anyone]]. Please ensure [[Wikipedia:Core content policies|core content policies]] are met before publishing it as a [[Wikipedia:What is an article?|live Wikipedia article]]{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{sp}}at [[{{{1}}}]]}}.{{sp}}{{{text|}}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
---- {{find sources}}
{{automated tools}}{{·}}{{Wikipedia logs|note={{{lognotes|}}}}}. ----
}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||{{clear}}
}}{{last edited by|brief=yes}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}} {{Namespace detect showall|1={{#ifeq:{{{noafc|}}}|yes||{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||{{#invoke:AfC submission catcheck|submitted|This draft has been submitted and is currently awaiting review.|{{#if:{{REVISIONID}}0|Finished drafting? {{Clickable button|Submit for review|url={{fullurl:Wikipedia:Articles_for_creation/Submitting|withJS=MediaWiki:AFC-submit-wizard.js&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive}}{{#ifeq:{{{nomove|}}}|yes||{{if autoconfirmed| or {{Clickable button|Publish now|url={{fullurl:Special:MovePage|wpOldTitle={{urlencode:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}&wpNewTitle={{urlencode:{{PAGENAME}}}}&wpMovetalk=1&wpReason=Publishing%20draft%20article}}|class=mw-ui-progressive}}}}}}|Save your work by pressing the "{{int:Publishpage}}" button below, and a button will appear here allowing you to submit your draft for review.}}}}}}}}|draft=1|other={{#ifeq:{{{demo|yes}}}|yes|1}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}}}}{{#if:{{{join-in|}}}|{{mbox|text='''Join in and [[Wikipedia:Be bold|help expand this draft]]!'''}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{demo|}}}|yes||[[Category:{{#switch:{{lc:{{{subject|}}}}} |agriculture|food|drink|agriculture, food, and drink=Drafts about agriculture, food, and drink |art|architecture|art and architecture=Drafts about art and architecture |engineering|technology|engineering and technology=Drafts about engineering and technology |film|films=Draft articles on films |geography|places|geography and places=Draft articles on geographical topics |history=Drafts about history |language|literature|language and literature=Drafts about language and literature |math|mathematics=Drafts about mathematics |media|drama|media and drama=Draft articles on media |music=Drafts about music |natural sciences=Drafts about natural sciences |philosophy|religion|philosophy and religion=Drafts about philosophy and religion |social sciences|society|social sciences and society=Drafts about social sciences and society |sports|recreation|sports and recreation=Drafts about sports and recreation |television|tv=Draft articles on television |video games=Draft articles on video games |warfare=Drafts about warfare |#default=Draft articles}}|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}{{NOINDEX}}}}}}{{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Namespace detect| |main={{if preview|{{Error|Do not use {{tl|Draft article}} in mainspace}}|}} |other={{#ifeq:{{{catonly|}}}|yes||{{mbox | name = Draft article | image = [[File:Under_construction_icon-blue.svg|40px|alt=|link=]] | text =
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Draft article check|{{{1}}}}}|{{Draft article check}}}}
'''This is a [[WP:Drafts|draft article]]'''. It is a work in progress [[Wikipedia:Be bold|open to editing]] by [[Wikipedia:Who writes Wikipedia?|anyone]]. Please ensure [[Wikipedia:Core content policies|core content policies]] are met before publishing it as a [[Wikipedia:What is an article?|live Wikipedia article]]{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{sp}}at [[{{{1}}}]]}}.{{sp}}{{{text|}}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
---- {{find sources}}
{{automated tools}}{{·}}{{Wikipedia logs|note={{{lognotes|}}}}}. ----
}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||{{clear}}
}}{{last edited by|brief=yes}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}} {{Namespace detect showall|1={{#ifeq:{{{noafc|}}}|yes||{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||{{#invoke:AfC submission catcheck|submitted|This draft has been submitted and is currently awaiting review.|{{#if:{{REVISIONID}}0|Finished drafting? {{Clickable button|Submit for review|url={{fullurl:Wikipedia:Articles_for_creation/Submitting|withJS=MediaWiki:AFC-submit-wizard.js&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive}}{{#ifeq:{{{nomove|}}}|yes||{{if autoconfirmed| or {{Clickable button|Publish now|url={{fullurl:Special:MovePage|wpOldTitle={{urlencode:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}&wpNewTitle={{urlencode:{{PAGENAME}}}}&wpMovetalk=1&wpReason=Publishing%20draft%20article}}|class=mw-ui-progressive}}}}}}|Save your work by pressing the "{{int:Publishpage}}" button below, and a button will appear here allowing you to submit your draft for review.}}}}}}}}|draft=1|other={{#ifeq:{{{demo|yes}}}|yes|1}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}}}}{{#if:{{{join-in|}}}|{{mbox|text='''Join in and [[Wikipedia:Be bold|help expand this draft]]!'''}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{demo|}}}|yes||[[Category:{{#switch:{{lc:{{{subject|}}}}} |agriculture|food|drink|agriculture, food, and drink=Drafts about agriculture, food, and drink |art|architecture|art and architecture=Drafts about art and architecture |engineering|technology|engineering and technology=Drafts about engineering and technology |film|films=Draft articles on films |geography|places|geography and places=Draft articles on geographical topics |history=Drafts about history |language|literature|language and literature=Drafts about language and literature |math|mathematics=Drafts about mathematics |media|drama|media and drama=Draft articles on media |music=Drafts about music |natural sciences=Drafts about natural sciences |philosophy|religion|philosophy and religion=Drafts about philosophy and religion |social sciences|society|social sciences and society=Drafts about social sciences and society |sports|recreation|sports and recreation=Drafts about sports and recreation |television|tv=Draft articles on television |video games=Draft articles on video games |warfare=Drafts about warfare |#default=Draft articles}}|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}{{NOINDEX}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Namespace detect| |main={{if preview|{{Error|Do not use {{tl|Draft article}} in mainspace}}|}} |other={{#ifeq:{{{catonly|}}}|yes||{{mbox | name = Draft article | image = [[File:Under_construction_icon-blue.svg|40px|alt=|link=]] | text =
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Draft article check|{{{1}}}}}|{{Draft article check}}}}
'''This is a [[WP:Drafts|draft article]]'''. It is a work in progress [[Wikipedia:Be bold|open to editing]] by [[Wikipedia:Who writes Wikipedia?|anyone]]. Please ensure [[Wikipedia:Core content policies|core content policies]] are met before publishing it as a [[Wikipedia:What is an article?|live Wikipedia article]]{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{sp}}at [[{{{1}}}]]}}.{{sp}}{{{text|}}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
---- {{find sources}}
{{automated tools}}{{·}}{{Wikipedia logs|note={{{lognotes|}}}}}. ----
}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||{{clear}}
}}{{last edited by|brief=yes}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}} {{Namespace detect showall|1={{#ifeq:{{{noafc|}}}|yes||{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||{{#invoke:AfC submission catcheck|submitted|This draft has been submitted and is currently awaiting review.|{{#if:{{REVISIONID}}0|Finished drafting? {{Clickable button|Submit for review|url={{fullurl:Wikipedia:Articles_for_creation/Submitting|withJS=MediaWiki:AFC-submit-wizard.js&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive}}{{#ifeq:{{{nomove|}}}|yes||{{if autoconfirmed| or {{Clickable button|Publish now|url={{fullurl:Special:MovePage|wpOldTitle={{urlencode:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}&wpNewTitle={{urlencode:{{PAGENAME}}}}&wpMovetalk=1&wpReason=Publishing%20draft%20article}}|class=mw-ui-progressive}}}}}}|Save your work by pressing the "{{int:Publishpage}}" button below, and a button will appear here allowing you to submit your draft for review.}}}}}}}}|draft=1|other={{#ifeq:{{{demo|yes}}}|yes|1}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}}}}{{#if:{{{join-in|}}}|{{mbox|text='''Join in and [[Wikipedia:Be bold|help expand this draft]]!'''}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{demo|}}}|yes||[[Category:{{#switch:{{lc:{{{subject|}}}}} |agriculture|food|drink|agriculture, food, and drink=Drafts about agriculture, food, and drink |art|architecture|art and architecture=Drafts about art and architecture |engineering|technology|engineering and technology=Drafts about engineering and technology |film|films=Draft articles on films |geography|places|geography and places=Draft articles on geographical topics |history=Drafts about history |language|literature|language and literature=Drafts about language and literature |math|mathematics=Drafts about mathematics |media|drama|media and drama=Draft articles on media |music=Drafts about music |natural sciences=Drafts about natural sciences |philosophy|religion|philosophy and religion=Drafts about philosophy and religion |social sciences|society|social sciences and society=Drafts about social sciences and society |sports|recreation|sports and recreation=Drafts about sports and recreation |television|tv=Draft articles on television |video games=Draft articles on video games |warfare=Drafts about warfare |#default=Draft articles}}|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}{{NOINDEX}}}}}}{{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{Namespace detect| |main={{if preview|{{Error|Do not use {{tl|Draft article}} in mainspace}}|}} |other={{#ifeq:{{{catonly|}}}|yes||{{mbox | name = Draft article | image = [[File:Under_construction_icon-blue.svg|40px|alt=|link=]] | text =
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Draft article check|{{{1}}}}}|{{Draft article check}}}}
'''This is a [[WP:Drafts|draft article]]'''. It is a work in progress [[Wikipedia:Be bold|open to editing]] by [[Wikipedia:Who writes Wikipedia?|anyone]]. Please ensure [[Wikipedia:Core content policies|core content policies]] are met before publishing it as a [[Wikipedia:What is an article?|live Wikipedia article]]{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{sp}}at [[{{{1}}}]]}}.{{sp}}{{{text|}}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
---- {{find sources}}
{{automated tools}}{{·}}{{Wikipedia logs|note={{{lognotes|}}}}}. ----
}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||{{clear}}
}}{{last edited by|brief=yes}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}} {{Namespace detect showall|1={{#ifeq:{{{noafc|}}}|yes||{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||{{#invoke:AfC submission catcheck|submitted|This draft has been submitted and is currently awaiting review.|{{#if:{{REVISIONID}}0|Finished drafting? {{Clickable button|Submit for review|url={{fullurl:Wikipedia:Articles_for_creation/Submitting|withJS=MediaWiki:AFC-submit-wizard.js&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive}}{{#ifeq:{{{nomove|}}}|yes||{{if autoconfirmed| or {{Clickable button|Publish now|url={{fullurl:Special:MovePage|wpOldTitle={{urlencode:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}&wpNewTitle={{urlencode:{{PAGENAME}}}}&wpMovetalk=1&wpReason=Publishing%20draft%20article}}|class=mw-ui-progressive}}}}}}|Save your work by pressing the "{{int:Publishpage}}" button below, and a button will appear here allowing you to submit your draft for review.}}}}}}}}|draft=1|other={{#ifeq:{{{demo|yes}}}|yes|1}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}}}}{{#if:{{{join-in|}}}|{{mbox|text='''Join in and [[Wikipedia:Be bold|help expand this draft]]!'''}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{demo|}}}|yes||[[Category:{{#switch:{{lc:{{{subject|}}}}} |agriculture|food|drink|agriculture, food, and drink=Drafts about agriculture, food, and drink |art|architecture|art and architecture=Drafts about art and architecture |engineering|technology|engineering and technology=Drafts about engineering and technology |film|films=Draft articles on films |geography|places|geography and places=Draft articles on geographical topics |history=Drafts about history |language|literature|language and literature=Drafts about language and literature |math|mathematics=Drafts about mathematics |media|drama|media and drama=Draft articles on media |music=Drafts about music |natural sciences=Drafts about natural sciences |philosophy|religion|philosophy and religion=Drafts about philosophy and religion |social sciences|society|social sciences and society=Drafts about social sciences and society |sports|recreation|sports and recreation=Drafts about sports and recreation |television|tv=Draft articles on television |video games=Draft articles on video games |warfare=Drafts about warfare |#default=Draft articles}}|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}{{NOINDEX}}}}}}{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23392883474|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Namespace detect| |main={{if preview|{{Error|Do not use {{tl|Draft article}} in mainspace}}|}} |other={{#ifeq:{{{catonly|}}}|yes||{{mbox | name = Draft article | image = [[File:Under_construction_icon-blue.svg|40px|alt=|link=]] | text =
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Draft article check|{{{1}}}}}|{{Draft article check}}}}
'''This is a [[WP:Drafts|draft article]]'''. It is a work in progress [[Wikipedia:Be bold|open to editing]] by [[Wikipedia:Who writes Wikipedia?|anyone]]. Please ensure [[Wikipedia:Core content policies|core content policies]] are met before publishing it as a [[Wikipedia:What is an article?|live Wikipedia article]]{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{sp}}at [[{{{1}}}]]}}.{{sp}}{{{text|}}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
---- {{find sources}}
{{automated tools}}{{·}}{{Wikipedia logs|note={{{lognotes|}}}}}. ----
}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||{{clear}}
}}{{last edited by|brief=yes}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}} {{Namespace detect showall|1={{#ifeq:{{{noafc|}}}|yes||{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||{{#invoke:AfC submission catcheck|submitted|This draft has been submitted and is currently awaiting review.|{{#if:{{REVISIONID}}0|Finished drafting? {{Clickable button|Submit for review|url={{fullurl:Wikipedia:Articles_for_creation/Submitting|withJS=MediaWiki:AFC-submit-wizard.js&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive}}{{#ifeq:{{{nomove|}}}|yes||{{if autoconfirmed| or {{Clickable button|Publish now|url={{fullurl:Special:MovePage|wpOldTitle={{urlencode:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}&wpNewTitle={{urlencode:{{PAGENAME}}}}&wpMovetalk=1&wpReason=Publishing%20draft%20article}}|class=mw-ui-progressive}}}}}}|Save your work by pressing the "{{int:Publishpage}}" button below, and a button will appear here allowing you to submit your draft for review.}}}}}}}}|draft=1|other={{#ifeq:{{{demo|yes}}}|yes|1}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}}}}{{#if:{{{join-in|}}}|{{mbox|text='''Join in and [[Wikipedia:Be bold|help expand this draft]]!'''}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{demo|}}}|yes||}}{{NOINDEX}}}}}}{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:{{#switch:{{lc:{{{subject|}}}}} |agriculture|food|drink|agriculture, food, and drink=Drafts about agriculture, food, and drink |art|architecture|art and architecture=Drafts about art and architecture |engineering|technology|engineering and technology=Drafts about engineering and technology |film|films=Draft articles on films |geography|places|geography and places=Draft articles on geographical topics |history=Drafts about history |language|literature|language and literature=Drafts about language and literature |math|mathematics=Drafts about mathematics |media|drama|media and drama=Draft articles on media |music=Drafts about music |natural sciences=Drafts about natural sciences |philosophy|religion|philosophy and religion=Drafts about philosophy and religion |social sciences|society|social sciences and society=Drafts about social sciences and society |sports|recreation|sports and recreation=Drafts about sports and recreation |television|tv=Draft articles on television |video games=Draft articles on video games |warfare=Drafts about warfare |#default=Draft articles}}|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Namespace detect| |main={{if preview|{{Error|Do not use {{tl|Draft article}} in mainspace}}|}} |other={{#ifeq:{{{catonly|}}}|yes||{{mbox | name = Draft article | image = [[File:Under_construction_icon-blue.svg|40px|alt=|link=]] | text =
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Draft article check|{{{1}}}}}|{{Draft article check}}}}

Please ensure [[Wikipedia:Core content policies|core content policies]] are met before publishing it as a [[Wikipedia:What is an article?|live Wikipedia article]]{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{sp}}at [[{{{1}}}]]}}.{{sp}}{{{text|}}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
---- {{find sources}}
{{automated tools}}{{·}}{{Wikipedia logs|note={{{lognotes|}}}}}. ----

}}}}{{#if:{{{join-in|}}}|{{mbox|text='''Join in and [[Wikipedia:Be bold|help expand this draft]]!'''}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{demo|}}}|yes||}}{{NOINDEX}}}}}}{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:{{#switch:{{lc:{{{subject|}}}}} |agriculture|food|drink|agriculture, food, and drink=Drafts about agriculture, food, and drink |art|architecture|art and architecture=Drafts about art and architecture |engineering|technology|engineering and technology=Drafts about engineering and technology |film|films=Draft articles on films |geography|places|geography and places=Draft articles on geographical topics |history=Drafts about history |language|literature|language and literature=Drafts about language and literature |math|mathematics=Drafts about mathematics |media|drama|media and drama=Draft articles on media |music=Drafts about music |natural sciences=Drafts about natural sciences |philosophy|religion|philosophy and religion=Drafts about philosophy and religion |social sciences|society|social sciences and society=Drafts about social sciences and society |sports|recreation|sports and recreation=Drafts about sports and recreation |television|tv=Draft articles on television |video games=Draft articles on video games |warfare=Drafts about warfare |#default=Draft articles}}|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Draft_article here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Namespace detect| |main={{if preview|{{Error|Do not use {{tl|Draft article}} in mainspace}}|}} |other={{#ifeq:{{{catonly|}}}|yes||{{mbox | name = Draft article | image = [[File:Under_construction_icon-blue.svg|40px|alt=|link=]] | text =
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Draft article check|{{{1}}}}}|{{Draft article check}}}}
'''This is a [[WP:Drafts|draft article]]'''. It is a work in progress [[Wikipedia:Be bold|open to editing]] by [[Wikipedia:Who writes Wikipedia?|anyone]]. Please ensure [[Wikipedia:Core content policies|core content policies]] are met before publishing it as a [[Wikipedia:What is an article?|live Wikipedia article]]{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{sp}}at [[{{{1}}}]]}}.{{sp}}{{{text|}}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
---- {{find sources}}
{{automated tools}}{{·}}{{Wikipedia logs|note={{{lognotes|}}}}}. ----
}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||{{clear}}
}}{{last edited by|brief=yes}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}} {{Namespace detect showall|1={{#ifeq:{{{noafc|}}}|yes||{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||{{#invoke:AfC submission catcheck|submitted|This draft has been submitted and is currently awaiting review.|{{#if:{{REVISIONID}}0|Finished drafting? {{Clickable button|Submit for review|url={{fullurl:Wikipedia:Articles_for_creation/Submitting|withJS=MediaWiki:AFC-submit-wizard.js&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive}}{{#ifeq:{{{nomove|}}}|yes||{{if autoconfirmed| or {{Clickable button|Publish now|url={{fullurl:Special:MovePage|wpOldTitle={{urlencode:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}&wpNewTitle={{urlencode:{{PAGENAME}}}}&wpMovetalk=1&wpReason=Publishing%20draft%20article}}|class=mw-ui-progressive}}}}}}|Save your work by pressing the "{{int:Publishpage}}" button below, and a button will appear here allowing you to submit your draft for review.}}}}}}}}|draft=1|other={{#ifeq:{{{demo|yes}}}|yes|1}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}}}}{{#if:{{{join-in|}}}|{{mbox|text='''Join in and [[Wikipedia:Be bold|help expand this draft]]!'''}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{demo|}}}|yes||}}{{NOINDEX}}}}}}{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:{{#switch:{{lc:{{{subject|}}}}} |agriculture|food|drink|agriculture, food, and drink=Drafts about agriculture, food, and drink |art|architecture|art and architecture=Drafts about art and architecture |engineering|technology|engineering and technology=Drafts about engineering and technology |film|films=Draft articles on films |geography|places|geography and places=Draft articles on geographical topics |history=Drafts about history |language|literature|language and literature=Drafts about language and literature |math|mathematics=Drafts about mathematics |media|drama|media and drama=Draft articles on media |music=Drafts about music |natural sciences=Drafts about natural sciences |philosophy|religion|philosophy and religion=Drafts about philosophy and religion |social sciences|society|social sciences and society=Drafts about social sciences and society |sports|recreation|sports and recreation=Drafts about sports and recreation |television|tv=Draft articles on television |video games=Draft articles on video games |warfare=Drafts about warfare |#default=Draft articles}}|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Namespace detect| |main={{if preview|{{Error|Do not use {{tl|Draft article}} in mainspace}}|}} |other={{#ifeq:{{{catonly|}}}|yes||{{mbox | name = Draft article | image = [[File:Under_construction_icon-blue.svg|40px|alt=|link=]] | text =
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Draft article check|{{{1}}}}}|{{Draft article check}}}}
'''This is a [[WP:Drafts|draft article]]'''. It is a work in progress [[Wikipedia:Be bold|open to editing]] by [[Wikipedia:Who writes Wikipedia?|anyone]]. Please ensure [[Wikipedia:Core content policies|core content policies]] are met before publishing it as a [[Wikipedia:What is an article?|live Wikipedia article]]{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{sp}}at [[{{{1}}}]]}}.{{sp}}{{{text|}}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
---- {{find sources}}
{{automated tools}}{{·}}{{Wikipedia logs|note={{{lognotes|}}}}}. ----
}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||{{clear}}
}}{{last edited by|brief=yes}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}} {{Namespace detect showall|1={{#ifeq:{{{noafc|}}}|yes||{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||{{#invoke:AfC submission catcheck|submitted|This draft has been submitted and is currently awaiting review.|{{#if:{{REVISIONID}}0|Finished drafting? {{Clickable button|Submit for review|url={{fullurl:Wikipedia:Articles_for_creation/Submitting|withJS=MediaWiki:AFC-submit-wizard.js&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive}}{{#ifeq:{{{nomove|}}}|yes||{{if autoconfirmed| or {{Clickable button|Publish now|url={{fullurl:Special:MovePage|wpOldTitle={{urlencode:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}&wpNewTitle={{urlencode:{{PAGENAME}}}}&wpMovetalk=1&wpReason=Publishing%20draft%20article}}|class=mw-ui-progressive}}}}}}|Save your work by pressing the "{{int:Publishpage}}" button below, and a button will appear here allowing you to submit your draft for review.}}}}}}}}|draft=1|other={{#ifeq:{{{demo|yes}}}|yes|1}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{brief|}}}|yes||
}}}}{{#if:{{{join-in|}}}|{{mbox|text='''Join in and [[Wikipedia:Be bold|help expand this draft]]!'''}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{demo|}}}|yes||}}{{NOINDEX}}}}}}{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:{{#switch:{{lc:{{{subject|}}}}} |agriculture|food|drink|agriculture, food, and drink=Drafts about agriculture, food, and drink |art|architecture|art and architecture=Drafts about art and architecture |engineering|technology|engineering and technology=Drafts about engineering and technology |film|films=Draft articles on films |geography|places|geography and places=Draft articles on geographical topics |history=Drafts about history |language|literature|language and literature=Drafts about language and literature |math|mathematics=Drafts about mathematics |media|drama|media and drama=Draft articles on media |music=Drafts about music |natural sciences=Drafts about natural sciences |philosophy|religion|philosophy and religion=Drafts about philosophy and religion |social sciences|society|social sciences and society=Drafts about social sciences and society |sports|recreation|sports and recreation=Drafts about sports and recreation |television|tv=Draft articles on television |video games=Draft articles on video games |warfare=Drafts about warfare |#default=Draft articles}}|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
